name: fdl-vtal
description: Ferramenta interna FDL VTAL - Geração de massa de testes QA

scripts.server:local: cross-env FDL_APP_PROFILE=local APP_PROFILE=local AUTH_MODE=local DATABASE_DRIVER=sqlite USE_MEMORY_QUEUE=1 node server/index.js
scripts.worker:local: cross-env FDL_APP_PROFILE=local APP_PROFILE=local AUTH_MODE=local DATABASE_DRIVER=sqlite USE_MEMORY_QUEUE=1 node server/worker.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server:local" "npm run worker:local" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.dev:qa: cross-env DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=1 concurrently "npm run server:qa" "npm run worker:qa" "npm run client:dev"
